docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,436.95 FILED BY LEDBETTER LAFREDA AS TO DEFENDANT JOYCE JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
